response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack and systems experience but lacks the core requirement of 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis project. No demonstrated Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience, and no SQL Server/Oracle background. Primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which does not align with the role.
strengths: Long software engineering career (~15 years) with exposure to low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
Polyglot background including some C/C++ at National Instruments and systems-level work in DLang
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ on Windows; C++ work is brief and dated (2014-2015)
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL exposure appears generic/MongoDB-heavy

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
